issues.title: Unable to create collecton,when manual  create  milvus vector

comments.body: Please specify which version you are using.

After reviewing the code, it appears that not only the `Milvus` vector store but other vector stores also operate in a similar manner.

The schema is initialized within the `afterPropertiesSet` method.
This method originates from the [`InitializingBean` interface.](https://docs.spring.io/spring-framework/docs/current/javadoc-api/org/springframework/beans/factory/InitializingBean.html)
